subcodes.title: Words to Youness Khan in 1904
subcodes.first_line: All the believers in Kashan were weeping and mourning. Here, there were fathers and mother patiently witnessing the agony of their beloved sons
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
